headline.zh-CN: 协作与曲目提交流程增强

summary.zh-CN: 本次更新加入主催代传外部曲师曲目的流程，并优化管理后台的曲目救援操作，减少不必要的必填原因。
summary.en: This update adds producer proxy uploads for external composers and streamlines admin track rescue operations by removing unnecessary required reasons.

description.zh-CN: 在主催自己的专辑上传曲目时，可以开启「为未使用系统的曲师代传」，填写外部曲师名后提交。曲目详情、审核工作台和母带页面会显示外部曲师与代传主催。
description.en: When uploading to their own album, producers can enable external-composer proxy submission and enter the external composer's name. Track detail, workflow, and mastering pages now show the external composer and proxy producer.

title.zh-CN: 曲目工作流操作的原因改为选填
title.en: Track workflow action reasons are now optional

description.zh-CN: 曲目救援区的原因输入框已标记为选填；留空时系统不再自动写入默认文案，审计记录会保留为空原因。
description.en: The reason field in the track rescue area is now marked optional. Leaving it blank no longer inserts default copy, and audit entries keep the reason empty.
